headline: Monolithic Power Systems (MPWR): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q4 Earnings?
summary: Monolithic Power Systems currently trades at $1,020 and has been a dream stock for shareholders. It’s returned 215% since March 2021, nearly tripling the S&P 500’s 76% gain. The company has also beaten the index over the past six months as its stock price is up 19% thanks to its solid quarterly results.

headline: IWP: Betting On Growth Without Mega-Caps Is Challenging
summary: iShares Russell Mid-Cap Growth ETF offers diversified mid-cap growth exposure. Click here to learn more about IWP and its holdings.
